assertion_results.text: The summary marks the run as failed
assertion_results.evidence: The output begins with "Run failed:" indicating the run was marked as failed.

assertion_results.text: The summary names at least one concrete artifact path from the source run
assertion_results.evidence: No artifact path is present in the output. It only contains: "Run failed: ValueError: activate_skill tool requires at least one skill."

assertion_results.text: The summary gives exactly one main next step or says none
assertion_results.evidence: The output provides no next step and does not state "none"; it only states the error message.
